Formula Used
Transaction Failure Rate (TFR)=( Number of Failed Transactions ​/ Total Number of Transactions) ×100
Failed Count (Payment Method)​ = ∑(Failed Transactions for each Payment Method)
Chargeback Rate= (Total Chargebacks / Total Transactions ) ×100
Failure Rate for Reason X=(Transactions Failed due to Reason X / Total Transactions Attempted) ×100
Failed Transactions Over Time=(Number of Failed Transactions in Time Period / Total Transactions in Time Period) ×100
Success Rate=(Number of Successful Transactions / Total Number of Transactions) ×100
Chargeback Ratio= (Total Chargebacks / Total Transactions)  ×100
